channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kalshi Promo Code FOXSPORTS: Get $10 Bonus After Your First $10 Trade
item.description: Use promo code FOXSPORTS for a $10 bonus after your first $10 trade on Kalshi.

item.title: Underdog Promo Code FOXSPORTS: Play $5 Get $50 in Bonus Entries
item.description: Use promo code FOXSPORTS to get $50 in bonus entries for a $5 play on Underdog Fantasy.

item.title: Best Sportsbook Promos & Bonus Bets - April 2026 Top Offers
item.description: Discover and compare top sportsbook promotions and bonus bets for April 2026.

item.title: DraftKings Promo: Bet $5, Receive $300 in Bonus Bets If Wager Wins
item.description: New DraftKings users can place a $5 wager and receive $300 in bonus bets if their first bet is successful.

item.title: Top Sports Betting Apps and Sites for 2026, Reviewed
item.description: A comparison of leading sports betting platforms for 2026, covering bonuses, key features, and factors to consider when selecting a sportsbook.
